Thanks for opening a pull request! Please fill in the sections below so we can

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn verify` passes locally
- [ ] New or updated rules have positive and negative unit tests
- [ ] `README.md` rule table is up to date (if a rule was added/removed/renamed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
